summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS US Listed Semiconductor 25 index, a market-cap-weighted index of 25 of the largest US-listed semiconductors companies. SMH was launched on Dec 20, 2011 and is issued by VanEck.

holdings.infoBox: SMH is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 19.86%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 9.08%, Broadcom at 6.00%, Advanced Micro Devices at 5.82%, and Micron Technology at 5.18%.
